title: Korean-Style Grilled Shrimp Skewers
description: A flavorful and spicy Korean-inspired dish featuring marinated shrimp grilled to perfection.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together gochujang, brown sugar, rice vinegar, ginger, and garlic.
Add the shrimp to the marinade and toss to coat.
Thread the marinated shrimp onto skewers.
Brush the grill with sesame oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the shrimp are pink and cooked through.
Serve immediately, garnished with toasted sesame seeds and chopped green onions.
